name: Grok 4 Fast
tagline: Faster, cheaper Grok 4 variant using ~40% fewer thinking tokens with comparable quality; up to 2M-token context.
metaDescription: Grok 4 Fast (xAI (Grok)), released 2025-09 — part of the Grok Fast line. Faster, cheaper Grok 4 variant using ~40% fewer thinking tokens with comparable qualit…
overview: Grok 4 Fast is a large language model from xAI (Grok), part of the Grok Fast line. Released 2025-09. Lower-cost, lower-latency variants of the flagship aimed at high-volume and agentic API use.
What's notable in this version: Faster, cheaper Grok 4 variant using ~40% fewer thinking tokens with comparable quality; up to 2M-token context.
